name: Anastrozole Tablets
about: Anastrozole Tablets are an effective medication used to treat breast cancer in postmenopausal women. These tablets are formulated using high-quality ingredients and are available in a tablet dosage form. The tablets are sourced from India and have a normal fermentation smell. The product has a shelf life of 12-24 months and should be stored in a dry place. Anastrozole Tablets work by reducing the production of estrogen in the body, which slows down or stops the growth of breast cancer cells. The medication is prescribed by doctors and should only be taken under medical supervision.

faq.q: What is the use of Anastrozole Tablets?
faq.a: Anastrozole Tablets are used to treat breast cancer in postmenopausal women.

faq.q: What is the dosage form of Anastrozole Tablets?
faq.a: Anastrozole Tablets are available in a tablet dosage form.

faq.q: Where are Anastrozole Tablets sourced from?
faq.a: Anastrozole Tablets are sourced from India.

faq.q: What is the shelf life of Anastrozole Tablets?
faq.a: The shelf life of Anastrozole Tablets is 12-24 months.

faq.q: How should Anastrozole Tablets be stored?
faq.a: Anastrozole Tablets should be stored in a dry place.
